import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    let part_opt = parts.get(i)
    match part_opt
    when Some(part)
      let n_opt = string.parse_int(part)
      match n_opt
      when Some(n)
        result = list.push(result, n)
      when None
        # skip unparseable token
      end
    when None
      # skip
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn merge_unique(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < a.len()
    let x_opt = a.get(i)
    match x_opt
    when Some(x)
      if not list.contains(result, x)
        result = list.push(result, x)
      end
    when None
      # skip
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut j = 0
  while j < b.len()
    let x_opt = b.get(j)
    match x_opt
    when Some(x)
      if not list.contains(result, x)
        result = list.push(result, x)
      end
    when None
      # skip
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  result
end

fn remove_first(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut found = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    let x_opt = xs.get(i)
    match x_opt
    when Some(x)
      if x == target and not found
        found = true
      else
        result = list.push(result, x)
      end
    when None
      # skip
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    let min_opt = list.min(remaining)
    match min_opt
    when Some(min_val)
      sorted = list.push(sorted, min_val)
      remaining = remove_first(remaining, min_val)
    when None
      remaining = []
    end
  end
  sorted
end

fn format_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  let n = xs.len()
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let x_opt = xs.get(i)
    match x_opt
    when Some(x)
      if i == 0
        result = "#{x}"
      else
        result = "#{result} #{x}"
      end
    when None
      # skip
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1_opt = io.read_line()
  let line2_opt = io.read_line()

  let line1 = match line1_opt
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let line2 = match line2_opt
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let nums1 = parse_line(line1)
  let nums2 = parse_line(line2)
  let union_list = merge_unique(nums1, nums2)
  let sorted_list = sort_list(union_list)
  println(format_list(sorted_list))
end
